rows.description: Mem: quod de 375:18s: 9d. anno superiori in cista remanentibus, soluta fuit Magro borman 149: 1g: 0d q, sir jam in cista remanent tempore hujus Computi 225: 16s: 11d. quas D: Computans petit allorari
rows.notes: This is the full narrative memorandum text. The amount associated with this memo (225/16/11.25) visually appears on the line *below* the narrative block. Therefore, this row itself has no amount in the ledger columns. Description taken from gemini-flash's comprehensive transcription. This is a visual override, splitting gemini-flash's single row (narrative + amount) into two for clarity.
rows.english_description: Memorandum recording sums from the previous year: noting the prior cash in the chest, a payment made to Magister Borman, and the balance now in the chest which the accountant petitions to allow.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Memorandum recording that £375 18s 9d remained in the chest from the previous year; £149 1s 0d was paid to Magister Borman; leaving £225 16s 11d now in the chest which the accountant petitions to allow.

rows.notes: This amount (225/16/11.25) is the conclusion of the preceding memorandum, visually aligned on a new line. Amount and 'q' (0.25) fraction are from gemini-flash (its row 35), visually verified. Description 'petit allorari' is derived from the last words of the narrative, consistent with gpt-5-mini's approach to assigning description for this specific amount (though gpt-5-mini had 'sic petit allocari'). This is a visual override, separating the amount from the narrative text it summarizes.
rows.english_description: The accountant requests allowance (to carry forward) of the remaining cash balance.
rows.english_description_with_amount: The accountant requests allowance of the remaining cash balance of £225 16s 11.25d.

rows.notes: Amount (114/15/9.75) from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms amount and '3q' (0.75) fraction, which gpt-5-mini missed. Description derived from image, including 'Sir' which both extractors missed, and using 'hoc' as written (not 'sive'). Row_type set to 'entry'.
rows.english_description: Sum introduced into the chest this year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Sum introduced into the chest this year, amounting to £114 15s 9.75d.
